title: Lenders Approved for SSBCI Loan Guarantee Program
summary: The University of Alaska Anchorage’s Small Business Development Center (SBDC) is happy to announce that as of March 13th, there are nine lenders approved to participate in the SSBCI Loan Guarantee Program .
